title: B1 Listening Part 1 - Test 11
instructions: For each question, listen to the short recording and choose the correct picture: A, B or C.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about a lost rucksack.
questions.audio_script: Woman: Did you find your rucksack? || Man: Not yet. I checked the sports centre, because I was sure I had it there after football practice. || Woman: And what about the bus? You went there afterwards. || Man: I asked, but nobody had seen it. Just now, the café owner phoned and said [1]my rucksack was under a chair near the door[/1]. I'm going to collect it before the place closes. || Woman: Good. You looked worried this morning. || Man: I was. I need it for tomorrow, so that is a big relief.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Did you find your rucksack?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Not yet. I checked the sports centre, because I was sure I had it there after football practice.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: And what about the bus? You went there afterwards.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I asked, but nobody had seen it. Just now, the café owner phoned and said my rucksack was under a chair near the door. I'm going to collect it before the place closes.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Good. You looked worried this morning.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I was. I need it for tomorrow, so that is a big relief.

questions.question: Where is the rucksack?

A.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, rucksack on a bus seat beside a window, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

B.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, rucksack under a café chair near a doorway, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

C.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, rucksack beside exercise mats in a sports hall, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

questions.explanation: The man says the café owner phoned and said the rucksack was under a chair near the door.

questions.context: You hear two friends making plans.
questions.audio_script: Man: Are we still going to the swimming pool after school? || Woman: I don't think so. I forgot my towel, and the pool closes early today. || Man: We could go to the park instead. || Woman: Maybe, but it looks like rain. My brother has two free tickets for the bowling centre, so [1]we're going bowling this afternoon instead[/1]. || Man: That sounds fine. Shall we meet outside the bus station? || Woman: Yes, at four. Bring your student card, because they sometimes ask for it at the desk. The bus is quicker.

questions.question: What are they going to do?

questions.audio_script: Speaker: Hi, it's Mia. I'm calling about tomorrow's music lesson. I told you it was at two, but that was my mistake. The teacher has a meeting then, and the room is not free after three. So [1]please come at half past one tomorrow[/1]. You don't need to bring your guitar because there are some in the classroom. If you are late, wait by the reception desk and I'll come down during the break. I know this is short notice, but it should still finish before lunch.

dialogue.speaker: speaker
dialogue.text: Hi, it's Mia. I'm calling about tomorrow's music lesson. I told you it was at two, but that was my mistake. The teacher has a meeting then, and the room is not free after three. So please come at half past one tomorrow. You don't need to bring your guitar because there are some in the classroom. If you are late, wait by the reception desk and I'll come down during the break. I know this is short notice, but it should still finish before lunch.

questions.question: What time should the listener arrive for the music lesson?

A.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, analogue clock with hands at half past one and no numbers, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

B.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, analogue clock with hands at three o'clock and no numbers, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

C.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, analogue clock with hands at two o'clock and no numbers, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

questions.explanation: The speaker says the listener should come at half past one.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about travelling to the museum.
questions.audio_script: Woman: How are you getting to the museum on Saturday? || Man: I was going to cycle, but my bike has a flat tyre. || Woman: I can ask someone to drive us. || Man: That's kind, but the car park there is tiny. I checked the timetable, and [1]the number 18 bus stops right outside the museum[/1]. || Woman: Great. Does it leave near your house? || Man: Yes, every twenty minutes. Let's take the one after lunch so we don't have to rush. I already have a travel card. That makes it cheaper for me.

questions.context: You hear a customer talking to a shop assistant.
questions.audio_script: Assistant: Can I help you with those shoes? || Customer: Yes, I like the black pair, but they feel a bit tight. My old pair broke last week, so I need new ones today. || Assistant: We also have them in brown. || Customer: The colour is fine. I just need something for walking to work every day. || Assistant: In that case, try these. || Customer: Thanks. [1]I'll take the black shoes in the next size up[/1], if you have them. || Assistant: I do. You can sit here while I get them from the store room.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about what to take.
questions.audio_script: Girl: Have you packed for the school trip? || Boy: Almost. I put in my shorts and sunglasses because the forecast was sunny yesterday. || Girl: It changed this morning. Our teacher said it may rain while we walk through the forest. || Boy: Really? Then I should change something. || Girl: I would. [1]Take your waterproof jacket instead of the light sweater[/1]. || Boy: Good idea. I don't want to carry an umbrella all day, and the jacket will fit in my small bag. I'll pack it now before I forget. Thanks for warning me.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Have you packed for the school trip?

dialogue.speaker: boy

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: It changed this morning. Our teacher said it may rain while we walk through the forest.

dialogue.text: Really? Then I should change something.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: I would. Take your waterproof jacket instead of the light sweater.

dialogue.speaker: boy

questions.context: You hear two people in a café.
questions.audio_script: Man: What are you ordering for lunch? || Woman: I wanted the chicken salad, but they only have it with nuts today. || Man: The tomato soup looks good. || Woman: It does, but I'm quite hungry after the gym. I think [1]I'll have the pasta with vegetables[/1]. || Man: Nice choice. I'm having that too. || Woman: Great. Could you save us a table near the window while I pay? The café is getting busy, and I don't want to sit outside. It's still cold today. || Woman: That should make things easier. || Woman: I did not want to decide at the last minute.
